allow: Bash(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f"{s[\\"name\\"]:28} atualizado: {s[\\"updated_at\\"]}"\) for s in d["secrets"] if s["name"] in \("MP_ACCESS_TOKEN","SITE_URL"\)]')
